tools.name: movscript_get_context_pack
tools.description: Return current MovScript UI route, selected project, current user, selected project item, available project resources, and local draft count. Use this before project-specific work.

tools.name: movscript_list_projects
tools.description: List all visible projects as numbered Markdown summaries.

tools.name: movscript_create_project
tools.description: Create a formal MovScript project after user approval.

tools.name: movscript_search_items
tools.description: Search business items such as scripts, creative materials, scene beats, shot plans, and asset needs in the current or specified project. Use when the user names content without a direct reference.

tools.name: movscript_read_item
tools.description: Read a single MovScript business item by reference.

tools.name: movscript_read_project_structure
tools.description: Read compact project structure across scripts, creative materials, scene beats, shot plans, asset needs, and pipeline nodes.

tools.name: movscript_search_memories
tools.description: Search local agent memories by query, scope, kind, project, or thread. Use when older preferences, decisions, warnings, item references, or draft notes may matter.

tools.name: movscript_open_item
tools.description: Navigate the MovScript UI to a project item page.
